expectations.text: Response uses `aider` as the agent argument, not `claude` or a generic placeholder
Response includes the `--tailscale` flag in the command
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly includes --tailscale in the command

expectations.text: Response provides the complete assembled command: `npx itwillsync aider --tailscale`
expectations.evidence: Output: 'npx itwillsync aider --tailscale' — exact full command present

expectations.text: Response explains WHY --tailscale is used (works outside home network / uses VPN IP, not just local WiFi)
expectations.evidence: Output: 'over your Tailscale VPN instead of just local WiFi, so you can reach it from anywhere your phone has Tailscale connectivity, even when away from home'
